ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., guard, forward, center) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number of the player in the draft */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the player */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school attended by the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College attended by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "assistant_coach" TEXT /* Name of the assistant coach */,
  "general_manager" TEXT /* Name of the general manager */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the arena */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is located */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the game */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff, finals) */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season for which the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "tickets_sold" INTEGER /* Number of tickets sold for the game */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "gp" INTEGER /* Games played by the player */,
  "gs" INTEGER /* Games started by the player */,
  "oreb" INTEGER /* Offensive rebounds by the player */,
  "dreb" INTEGER /* Defensive rebounds by the player */,
  "reb" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the player */,
  "rpg" REAL /* Rebounds per game by the player */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Steals by the player */,
  "spg" REAL /* Steals per game by the player */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Blocks by the player */,
  "bpg" REAL /* Blocks per game by the player */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "fgm" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted by the player */,
  "fgp" REAL /* Field goal percentage of the player */,
  "tpm" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made by the player */,
  "tpa" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted by the player */,
  "tpp" REAL /* Three-point percentage of the player */,
  "ftm" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the player */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted by the player */,
  "ftp" REAL /* Free throw percentage of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player season statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "gp" INTEGER /* Games played by the player */,
  "gs" INTEGER /* Games started by the player */,
  "oreb" INTEGER /* Offensive rebounds by the player */,
  "dreb" INTEGER /* Defensive rebounds by the player */,
  "reb" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the player */,
  "rpg" REAL /* Rebounds per game by the player */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Steals by the player */,
  "spg" REAL /* Steals per game by the player */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Blocks by the player */,
  "bpg" REAL /* Blocks per game by the player */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "fgm" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted by the player */,
  "fgp" REAL /* Field goal percentage of the player */,
  "tpm" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made by the player */,
  "tpa" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted by the player */,
  "tpp" REAL /* Three-point percentage of the player */,
  "ftm" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the player */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted by the player */,
  "ftp" REAL /* Free throw percentage of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the coach */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the coach */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who won the award */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the award */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season for which the award was won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the game log */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game for which the log was accessed */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_log_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who was injured */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., concussion, sprain, strain) */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suspensions" (
  "suspension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspension */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who was suspended */,
  "suspension_date" TEXT /* Date the suspension was issued */,
  "suspension_length" INTEGER /* Length of the suspension (in games) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the suspension */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suspensions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who signed the contract */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract (in years) */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Total value of the contract */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average annual salary of the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the team */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Points scored per game by the team */,
  "opponent_points_per_game" REAL /* Points allowed per game by the team */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Rebounds per game by the team */,
  "opponent_rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Rebounds allowed per game by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)
